mapper.select:
SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.phone as phone, u.role as role, u.kyc_status as kycStatus, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u
AND u.id = #{userId} AND u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{email}, '%') AND u.first_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{firstName}, '%') AND u.last_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lastName}, '%') AND u.role = #{role} AND u.phone = #{phone} AND u.state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.phone as phone, u.role as role, u.kyc_status as kycStatus, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u WHERE u.id = #{userId}
SELECT u.state_id as stateId, count(*) as userCount FROM user_profiles u GROUP BY u.state_id

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.role as role, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u WHERE u.state_id = 'REGISTERED' ORDER BY u.created_time DESC

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.role as role, u.suspend_reason as suspendReason, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u WHERE u.state_id = 'SUSPENDED'

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.phone as phone, u.role as role, u.kyc_status as kycStatus, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u WHERE u.email = #{email}

SELECT u.id as id, u.id as userId, u.first_name as firstName, u.last_name as lastName, u.email as email, u.phone as phone, u.role as role, u.kyc_status as kycStatus, u.state_id as stateId FROM user_profiles u WHERE u.role = #{role}
